# Released Bergamot model pairs for benchmarking (qvac_bergamot backend)
# One pair per line in format: src-trg (e.g., en-it)
# Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored
#
# Model path pattern: bergamot-{pair_code}/

# Bergamot pairs (from model registry)
en-ar
en-cs
en-es
en-fr
en-it
en-ja
en-pt
en-ru
en-zh
ar-en
cs-en
es-en
fr-en
it-en
ja-en
pt-en
ru-en
zh-en
